calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Continued To Oct-15-26 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 502

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Plaintiffs' Complaint For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom): Marissa Uchimura, Esq. of Maune Raichle Hartley French & Mudd, LLC for Plaintiffs; Todd Thacker, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP for defendant Viking Pump, Inc.

Hearing RE: DEFENDANT VIKING PUMP INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION.

Matter contested. Argument held. At the conclusion of argument, the court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Ed Santos and Jackie Alameda; Matter reported; Court reporter (via Zoom): Shiela Pham, CSR #13293, Tel No. (415) 274-9977, Email: sfdepo@veritext.com; Bailiff: Not Present. (D304/EPS)

**Following the hearing, the court issues an ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT VIKING PUMP INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION.**
